Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Visiri]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — A Visiri explorer found Horizon last week.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Visiri is an opponent with three eyes and scarlet skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — A Visiri pistol duelist is a character Shyrax defeats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — Raion Raithe is a Visiri man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Visiri warriors are known to be able to tear starship armor with their bare hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Visiri are a species with energy pools used for empowerment, concussive bolts, and hovering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Visiri warriors are skilled at flying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — Visiri tend to have a weaker connection to the Aether than other intelligent species.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — The Reaver is a muscled Visiri man with pale pink skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The narrator is a powerful Visiri warrior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion is a Visiri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Denon Javal is half-Visiri.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Blade Dancer is a Visiri woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Visiri are a type of being with high physical strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Alliance contains a handful of Visiri planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Visiri cannot survive outside an atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Visiri men are holding Jak Escalon.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Visiri are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Visiri are opponents fought in the ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Visiri are high-level Combat Artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Visiri make up most of the crowd in the Visirian capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Visiri species are universally superhuman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — The Visiri have three eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — The Visiri possess a third eye designed for watching vitality and energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Visiri are a group of fighters/people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Visiri are the clear number two in the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Visiri are not known for their magical scanners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Visiri are a group that the crew intends to disable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Visiri are a group that uses swords and spears for dueling.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Visiri are a group of people who use red auras and levitation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — The Visiri are neighbors to Shyrax's culture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The Visiri relief effort is ongoing.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
